pages.text: This datapack-defined multiblock ($(bold)multilib:example_simple$()) is a 5-layer decorative pillar built entirely from vanilla blocks. It has no custom logic attached - it exists purely to show off datapack-driven multiblock definitions.

Its core is the $(bold)Emerald Block$() buried in the second layer. The structure can be rotated freely around the vertical axis (any of the 4 horizontal facings are accepted), and it supports MultiLib's auto-place preview overlay. Assemble the pattern shown below, then it will complete on its own once the last block is placed.

pages.name: Ceremonial Pillar
pages.text: The full 5-layer pattern, shown from bottom to top on the visualizer. The marked center block is the Emerald Block core.
Tip: layer 1 (the bottom ring, directly below the core layer) is hollow in the middle - only the four sides and corners are Diamond Blocks, leaving the center open beneath the core.
